codeSystems.name: NepalCasteEthnicityCS
codeSystems.title: Nepal HMIS Caste and Ethnicity Group Code System
codeSystems.description: Official classification of caste and ethnic groups utilized by the Ministry of Health and Population (MoHP) Nepal for health management information systems (HMIS).

codeSystems.title: Nepal Districts Code System
codeSystems.description: The official 77 administrative districts of Nepal sorted by regional alignment.

codeSystems.description: Official code system for types of local governance bodies (Palikas) in Nepal.
